mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_BBS_SURVEY ( SRVY_TTL, SRVY_QITEM, CO_SN, COHORT_SN, SRVY_BGNG_DT, SRVY_END_DT, SRVY_SCOPE, BBS_TYPE, USER_SN, SRVY_FRST_WRT_DT, FORM_UUID ) VALUES ( #{dto.srvyTtl}, CAST(#{dto.srvyQitem, jdbcType=OTHER} AS JSON), #{dto.coSn}, #{dto.cohortSn}, #{dto.srvyBgngDt}, #{dto.srvyEndDt}, #{dto.srvyScope}, COALESCE(#{dto.bbsType}, 'SURVEY'), #{dto.userSn}, NOW(), #{uuid} )
mapper.select: SELECT S.SRVY_SN AS srvySn, S.SRVY_TTL AS srvyTtl, S.SRVY_QITEM AS srvyQitem, S.CO_SN AS coSn, S.COHORT_SN AS cohortSn, S.USER_SN AS userSn, U.USER_NM AS userNm, S.SRVY_BGNG_DT AS srvyBgngDt, S.SRVY_END_DT AS srvyEndDt, S.SRVY_SCOPE AS srvyScope, S.BBS_TYPE AS bbsType, S.FORM_UUID AS formUuid, S.VIEW_CNT AS viewCnt, S.DEL_YN AS delYn, S.SRVY_FRST_WRT_DT AS srvyFrstWrtDt, S.SRVY_LAST_MDFCN_DT AS srvyLastMdfcnDt FROM TB_BBS_SURVEY S JOIN TB_USER U ON S.USER_SN = U.USER_SN WHERE S.SRVY_SN = #{srvySn} AND S.DEL_YN = FALSE
SELECT USER_SN AS writerSn, COHORT_SN AS cohortSn, SRVY_SCOPE AS srvyScope FROM TB_BBS_SURVEY WHERE SRVY_SN = #{srvySn} AND DEL_YN = FALSE LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_BBS_SURVEY SET SRVY_TTL = #{dto.srvyTtl}, SRVY_QITEM = #{dto.srvyQitem}, CO_SN = #{dto.coSn}, COHORT_SN = #{dto.cohortSn}, SRVY_BGNG_DT = #{dto.srvyBgngDt}, SRVY_END_DT = #{dto.srvyEndDt}, SRVY_SCOPE = #{dto.srvyScope}, BBS_TYPE = #{dto.bbsType}, SRVY_LAST_MDFCN_DT = NOW() WHERE SRVY_SN = #{srvySn} AND USER_SN = #{dto.userSn}

UPDATE TB_BBS_SURVEY SET SRVY_TTL = #{dto.srvyTtl}, SRVY_QITEM = #{dto.srvyQitem}, CO_SN = #{dto.coSn}, COHORT_SN = #{dto.cohortSn}, SRVY_BGNG_DT = #{dto.srvyBgngDt}, SRVY_END_DT = #{dto.srvyEndDt}, SRVY_SCOPE = #{dto.srvyScope}, BBS_TYPE = #{dto.bbsType}, SRVY_LAST_MDFCN_DT = NOW() WHERE SRVY_SN = #{srvySn}
UPDATE TB_BBS_SURVEY SET DEL_YN = TRUE, SRVY_LAST_MDFCN_DT = NOW() WHERE SRVY_SN = #{srvySn}
